data.description: Download a curated collection of Quran data as JSON — recitations, translations, tafsir, word-by-word, Uthmani/IndoPak scripts, metadata and themes — for developers, researchers and students.
data.html:
Resources Tools Docs Community FAQ Github CMS
Resources Tools Docs Credits Community FAQ Github

Quranic Universal Library, is the largest library of Quranic content available for download. Build amazing projects using these invaluable resources.

About QUL Resources

Below you will find a list of the categories of Quranic data available on QUL, for example translations, tafsirs, and surah information. Clicking on one of these resource categories will take you to a page where you can download the various resources belonging to that category in formats such as sqlite and json. For more granular options to find and download resources, visit the advanced admin panel. Resources included in QUL are intended for you to download and package with your own project; no API is available

Important Notice

The information on this page comes from external sources and may contain errors. While we aim for accuracy, we cannot guarantee all content is complete or correct. No translation of the Qur'an can fully capture its deeper meanings, and translations may have limitations based on the translator’s understanding. Please use these translations as references, not definitive interpretations.

If you find any issues with the resources provided, please report them to us. Your feedback is valuable in helping us improve the quality and accuracy of the Quranic content.

Available Resources

14
View: List Grid
Resource Description Count
Recitations and segments data
71 Unsegmented Audio
57 Segmented Audio
 Download high-quality audio files of Quranic recitations along with detailed timestamp data for ayah-by-ayah and surah-by-surah. Use the timestamp data to highlight words as the recitation plays.
Download high-quality audio files of Quranic recitations along with detailed timestamp data for ayah-by-ayah and surah-by-surah. Use the timestamp data to highlight words as the recitation plays. 128
Mushaf layouts
20 Layouts — Approved
8 Layouts — WIP
 Download Mushaf layout data to render Quran pages exactly like the printed Mushaf. The exact layout aids in memorizing the Quran, offering users a familiar experience similar to their favorite printed Mushaf.
Download Mushaf layout data to render Quran pages exactly like the printed Mushaf. The exact layout aids in memorizing the Quran, offering users a familiar experience similar to their favorite printed Mushaf. 28
Translations
200 Translations
16 Word by word translations
 Download ayah by ayah and word by word translation in different languages.
Download ayah by ayah and word by word translation in different languages. 216
Tafsirs
35 Mukhtasar tafsirs
80 Detailed tafsirs
 Download tafsir data in multiple languages, with ayah grouping information.
Download tafsir data in multiple languages, with ayah grouping information. 115
Quran script: Unicode & Images
Indopak
Uthmani, tajweed
 Download the Quran script in Unicode text or image formats, including Madani, IndoPak, and Uthmani scripts.
Download the Quran script in Unicode text or image formats, including Madani, IndoPak, and Uthmani scripts. 28
Quran Fonts
Indopak
Madani
 Download Quran-related fonts, including glyph-based, Unicode, and translation fonts. Also includes specialized fonts for Surah names and headings.
Download Quran-related fonts, including glyph-based, Unicode, and translation fonts. Also includes specialized fonts for Surah names and headings. 19
Quran metadata
Total resources
 Download Quran metadata, surah, ayah, juz, hizb, rub, manzil etc.
Download Quran metadata, surah, ayah, juz, hizb, rub, manzil etc. 8
Transliteration
9 Ayah by Ayah
1 Word by Word
 Download transliteration data to read the Quranic text in Latin script.
Download transliteration data to read the Quranic text in Latin script. 10
Surah information
In 9 Languages
 Detailed descriptions of all Surah, including when they were revealed, core themes, and key topics etc.
Detailed descriptions of all Surah, including when they were revealed, core themes, and key topics etc. 9
Topics and concepts in the Quran
2512 topics
 Key concepts/topics in the Quran and semantic relations between these concepts.
Key concepts/topics in the Quran and semantic relations between these concepts. 2512
Quranic Grammar and Morphology Quranic Grammar (part of speech for each word), morphology, roots, lemmas and stems data.
Quranic Grammar (part of speech for each word), morphology, roots, lemmas and stems data. 77432
Mutashabihat ul Quran Similarities in meaning, context, or wording among ayah phrases in the Quran.
Similarities in meaning, context, or wording among ayah phrases in the Quran. 5277
Similiar ayahs Download Ayahs from the Quran that share similarities in meaning, context, or wording. This data allows you to explore and access Ayahs that closely align with each other.
Download Ayahs from the Quran that share similarities in meaning, context, or wording. This data allows you to explore and access Ayahs that closely align with each other. 4001
Ayah theme Core themes and topics of each ayah in the Quran.
Core themes and topics of each ayah in the Quran. 1049
